title: Leaking PII at Scale: How Third Parties Can Unintentionally Put Your Data at Risk
excerpt: How I discovered a misconfiguration exposing personally identifiable information at scale through third-party integrations.

title: Exposing Hidden DOS Techniques Laying in Plain Sight
excerpt: Uncovering denial-of-service attack vectors hiding in everyday application functionality that most testers overlook.

title: IIS Welcome Page to Source Code Review to LFI
excerpt: How a default IIS welcome page led to source code review and ultimately a Local File Inclusion vulnerability.

title: The Great Chain of Duplicates: Utilizing Javascript and Logic in Bug Bounty
excerpt: Leveraging JavaScript analysis and logical thinking to discover unique vulnerabilities in bug bounty programs.

title: Account Takeover Hidden in Javascript Files Plus Some Extra Work
excerpt: A follow-up collaboration diving deeper into the broken access control vulnerability found in JavaScript files.

title: Account Takeover Hidden in JavaScript Files
excerpt: Finding a broken access control vulnerability hidden in JavaScript files enabling full account takeover on a private program.

title: GraphQL Path Traversal Leading to Disclosure of PII
excerpt: Discovered a path traversal vulnerability in a GraphQL endpoint that allowed access to restricted internal APIs and exposure of personally identifiable information.

title: IDOR: Unpin Posts for Fun
excerpt: Exploited an Insecure Direct Object Reference on LinkedIn's bug bounty program that allowed unpinning any user's posts without authorization.
